ToolboxElements.Description: Insert a row with a unique key and one data column.
ToolboxElements.Name: MySQL Insert (1 Column)

ToolboxElements.Description: Insert a row with a unique key and two data columns.
ToolboxElements.Name: MySQL Insert (2 Columns)

ToolboxElements.Description: Insert a row with a unique key and three data columns.
ToolboxElements.Name: MySQL Insert (3 Columns)

ToolboxElements.Description: Upsert using ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE for one data column (requires UNIQUE/PK on <KeyColumn>).
ToolboxElements.Name: MySQL Upsert (1 Column)

ToolboxElements.Description: Upsert for two data columns; updates both on key conflict.
ToolboxElements.Name: MySQL Upsert (2 Columns)

ToolboxElements.Description: Upsert for three data columns; updates all on key conflict.
ToolboxElements.Name: MySQL Upsert (3 Columns)
